curation_notes: Primary location derived from patch diff which modifies only internal/route/repo/editor.go in the editFilePost function. The patch adds two symlink checks: one for the new target path and one for the old file path when renaming. The pre-assigned class path-traversal (CWE-22) is correct — the vulnerability uses symlinks to traverse outside the repository directory. No sibling files contain the same vulnerability pattern; wiki.go has no symlink handling.
